svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="三侧分包" id="dddSides"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-114" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="920" pageHeight="400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="三侧分包：C 端只读禁依赖运营写端，shared 被两侧共享，安全边界 ArchUnit 守" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="190" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="OPS" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="operatorside（运营写端）
19 个 Controller：/sites /pages /leads /users...
需要鉴权（X-User-ID + Admin）
写 pages 草稿表" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="40" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PUB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="publicside（C 端只读端）
/public/** 留资提交
免鉴权，对外暴露
读 published_pages 快照，不写" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="560" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SHARED" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=10;" value="shared（共享领域层）
domain/*Aggregate（充血聚合根，零框架依赖）
entity（贫血 POJO）/ mapper / exception
port（端口接口，publicside 经它解耦）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="320" x="300" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="OPS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=open;strokeColor=#475569;" target="SHARED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="PUB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=open;strokeColor=#475569;" target="SHARED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BLOCK" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;" value="✕ 禁止依赖
PublicsideIsolationTest 守" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="160" x="400" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EB1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;startFill=0;endFill=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="400" y="104" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="104" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EB2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;dashed=1;startFill=0;endFill=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="560" y="104" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="620" y="104" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="依赖方向只能向下到 shared，publicside 绝不碰 operatorside —— 安全边界用测试守，不靠自觉" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="680" x="120" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 421px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 三侧分包：C 端只读禁依赖运营写端，shared 被两侧共享，安全边界 ArchUnit 守

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
operatorside（运营写端）
19 个 Controller：/sites /pages /leads /users...
需要鉴权（X-User-ID + Admin）
写 pages 草稿表

publicside（C 端只读端）
/public/** 留资提交
